SEARCH
Package bigFiles.files

Class BigFolder

java.lang.Object
bigFiles.files.BigFile
bigFiles.files.BigFolder
public class BigFolder extends BigFile
A Composite class representing a directory specifically for BigFiles. This class ensures that large-scale data structures can be organized hierarchically without mixing with standard RAM-based files.
Author:
Elias Kassas

    Description
    void
    add(BigFile component)
    Adds a BigFile or another BigFolder to this directory.

    Broadcasts an append operation to all children in the folder.

    Folder indexing simply refreshes the timestamp and clears sync flags to ensure children are checked during the next write.

    • add

      public void add(BigFile component)
      Adds a BigFile or another BigFolder to this directory.
      Parameters:

      public void remove(BigFile component)
      Removes a child from the internal map.
      Parameters:
      component - The BigFile element to remove.

    • buildIndex

      public void buildIndex() throws IOException
      Folder indexing simply refreshes the timestamp and clears sync flags to ensure children are checked during the next write.
      Specified by:
      buildIndex in class BigFile
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be accessed.

    • read

      public void read() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: BigFile
      Reads metadata and rebuilds the index if the file has changed.
      Specified by:
      read in class BigFile
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • write

      public void write(Object... args) throws Exception
      Recursively saves all modified children to the disk. This ensures that only "dirty" files are processed, saving I/O time.
      Specified by:
      write in class BigFile
      Parameters:
      args - Data to be written to the file.
      Throws:
      Exception - If writing fails.

    • append

      public void append(Object... args) throws Exception
      Broadcasts an append operation to all children in the folder.
      Specified by:
      append in class BigFile
      Throws:
      Exception - If the operation fails.

    • deletePhysicalFile

      public boolean deletePhysicalFile()
      Recursively deletes all physical files and subfolders.
      Specified by:
      deletePhysicalFile in class BigFile
      Returns:
      true if the entire directory tree was successfully deleted.

    • getChildren

      public List<BigFile> getChildren()
      Returns the list of BigFile children.
